title: International Development Association (Second Additional Financing for Social Support for Resilient Livelihoods Project) (Authorization) Act, 2023
title_en: International Development Association (Second Additional Financing for Social Support for Resilient Livelihoods Project) (Authorization) Act, 2023

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: This Act may be cited as the International Development Association (Second Additional Financing for Social Support for Resilient Livelihoods Project) (Authorization) Act, 2023.

provisions.title: Authority to receive the sum of SDR 85,800,000
provisions.content: (1) The Minister of Finance, on behalf of the Government of the Republic of Malawi, is hereby authorized to receive from the International Development Association, a grant in various convertible currencies, not exceeding in the aggregate, the equivalent of eighty-five million, eight hundred thousand Special Drawing Rights (SDR 85,800,000) (the “Financing”). (2) The Financing shall be applied for the purpose specified in section 3 , at the times and on the terms and conditions which the Minister may, in his discretion, agree with the International Development Association. (3) The terms and conditions referred to in subsection (2) shall be reduced to writing and such agreement is hereinafter referred to as the “Financing Agreement”.

provisions.title: Application of the Financing
provisions.content: The proceeds of the Financing authorized by section 2 shall be appropriated and applied for the purpose of providing second additional financing for the Social Support for Resilient Livelihoods Project, and for no other purpose.

provisions.title: Payments charged on the Consolidated Fund
provisions.content: Any payments required to be made, from time to time, by the Government to the International Development Association, under and in accordance with the provisions of the Financing Agreement, are hereby charged on the Consolidated Fund.

provisions.title: Exemption from taxes, charges, etc.
provisions.content: All sums to be paid in accordance with section 4 shall, notwithstanding the provisions of any other written law, be paid without deductions for, and free from, any tax or charge whatsoever, and shall be free from all restrictions or limitations imposed by or under any written law of Malawi.

provisions.title: Finalization and signature of the Financing Agreement
provisions.content: The Minister or such other persons as he may appoint, is hereby authorized to— (a) settle the terms of the Financing Agreement, but not so as to affect the general purpose thereof, nor to increase the amount of the Financing; (b) sign the Financing Agreement on behalf of the Government; and (c) do such other things as may be necessary to implement the terms of the Financing Agreement.
